description: Reduced carbohydrate diet focusing on proteins, healthy fats, and non-starchy vegetables for steady energy

lc_spinach_feta_omelet.name: Spinach & Feta Omelet
lc_spinach_feta_omelet.description: Fluffy three-egg omelet stuffed with sauteed spinach, sun-dried tomatoes, and crumbled feta cheese
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper in a bowl.
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add spinach and sun-dried tomatoes, saute for 1 minute until spinach wilts.
Pour eggs over the vegetables and tilt pan to spread evenly. Cook undisturbed for 2 minutes until edges set.
Sprinkle feta over one half, fold the omelet, and cook 1 more minute until center is just set.
Slide onto a plate and serve immediately.

lc_avocado_bacon_eggs.name: Avocado Bacon & Eggs
lc_avocado_bacon_eggs.description: Crispy bacon strips alongside perfectly fried eggs served with sliced avocado and a sprinkle of everything seasoning
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Pour off most of the bacon grease, leaving about 1 tablespoon in the pan.
Crack eggs into the skillet and fry to desired doneness, about 3 minutes for over-easy.
Plate the eggs alongside bacon and sliced avocado. Sprinkle everything seasoning and sea salt over the avocado.

lc_sausage_pepper_scramble.name: Sausage & Pepper Scramble
lc_sausage_pepper_scramble.description: Hearty scrambled eggs with crumbled Italian sausage, diced bell peppers, and sharp cheddar cheese
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Crumble sausage into the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add diced bell peppers and saute for 2 minutes until slightly softened.
Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, pour into the skillet, and stir gently with a spatula as they cook.
When eggs are nearly set, sprinkle cheddar on top. Remove from heat, cover for 30 seconds to melt cheese, and serve.

lc_greek_yogurt_berry_bowl.name: Greek Yogurt Berry Bowl
lc_greek_yogurt_berry_bowl.description: Thick full-fat Greek yogurt topped with fresh mixed berries, sliced almonds, and a drizzle of sugar-free vanilla
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl and stir in vanilla extract.
Top with blueberries and raspberries.
Sprinkle sliced almonds and chia seeds over the berries.
Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 2 hours.

lc_smoked_salmon_cream_cheese_roll.name: Smoked Salmon Cream Cheese Rolls
lc_smoked_salmon_cream_cheese_roll.description: Silky smoked salmon wrapped around herbed cream cheese with capers and fresh dill on a bed of arugula
instructions: Mix softened cream cheese with chopped dill, lemon juice, and black pepper.
Lay smoked salmon slices flat and spread a thin layer of herbed cream cheese on each.
Place a few capers on each slice and roll up tightly.
Arrange arugula on a plate and place salmon rolls on top. Serve chilled.

lc_mushroom_swiss_egg_cups.name: Mushroom Swiss Egg Cups
lc_mushroom_swiss_egg_cups.description: Baked egg cups with sauteed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, and fresh thyme in a muffin tin for easy grab-and-go mornings
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Spray 4 cups of a muffin tin with cooking spray.
Melt butter in a skillet, add mushrooms and thyme, and saute over medium heat for 4 minutes until golden.
Divide mushrooms evenly among the 4 muffin cups. Top each with Swiss cheese.
Crack one egg into each cup, season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until egg whites are set but yolks are still slightly soft. Cool 2 minutes before removing.

lc_coconut_chia_pudding.name: Coconut Chia Pudding
lc_coconut_chia_pudding.description: Creamy overnight chia pudding made with coconut milk, topped with toasted coconut flakes and a few fresh raspberries
instructions: Combine chia seeds, coconut milk, almond milk, and vanilla in a jar or bowl. Stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight, stirring once after 30 minutes to prevent clumping.
In the morning, stir the pudding and add a splash more almond milk if too thick.
Top with toasted coconut flakes and fresh raspberries before serving.

lc_ham_cheese_lettuce_wrap.name: Ham & Cheese Lettuce Wraps
lc_ham_cheese_lettuce_wrap.description: Deli ham and melted provolone wrapped in crisp romaine leaves with mustard and crunchy pickles
instructions: Wash and pat dry the romaine leaves, trimming the thick base if needed.
Spread a thin layer of Dijon mustard on each lettuce leaf.
Layer ham and provolone slices evenly across the leaves.
Place a pickle spear half on each, grind black pepper on top, and roll up tightly. Secure with toothpicks if desired.

lc_grilled_chicken_caesar_bowl.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Bowl
lc_grilled_chicken_caesar_bowl.description: Sliced grilled chicken breast over chopped romaine with shaved Parmesan, crunchy pork rinds, and creamy Caesar dressing
instructions: Season chicken breast with olive oil, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Let sit 5 minutes.
Grill or pan-sear chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches 165F. Rest 5 minutes, then slice.
Arrange chopped romaine in a bowl, top with sliced chicken and shaved Parmesan.
Drizzle Caesar dressing over the bowl and top with crushed pork rinds for crunch.

lc_tuna_stuffed_avocado.name: Tuna Stuffed Avocado
lc_tuna_stuffed_avocado.description: Ripe avocado halves filled with seasoned albacore tuna salad, celery, and a squeeze of lime
ingredients: 1 medium ripe avocado, halved and pitted
instructions: Combine drained tuna, mayonnaise, celery, red onion, and smoked paprika in a bowl. Mix well.
Season with salt, pepper, and half the lime juice.
Scoop a small amount of avocado flesh from each half to widen the cavity. Dice and fold into the tuna mixture.
Pile tuna salad into avocado halves, squeeze remaining lime juice on top, and serve.

lc_zucchini_noodle_bolognese.name: Zucchini Noodle Bolognese
lc_zucchini_noodle_bolognese.description: Spiralized zucchini noodles tossed with a rich ground beef and tomato bolognese sauce with fresh basil
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add ground beef, breaking it apart, and cook until browned, about 6 minutes. Drain excess fat.
Stir in crushed tomatoes, oregano, and dried basil. Simmer on medium-low for 12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, saute spiralized zucchini for 2-3 minutes over medium heat until just tender.
Plate the zucchini noodles, ladle bolognese sauce on top, and garnish with fresh basil and Parmesan.

lc_cauliflower_fried_rice.name: Cauliflower Fried Rice with Shrimp
lc_cauliflower_fried_rice.description: Riced cauliflower stir-fried with shrimp, scrambled egg, snap peas, and ginger-soy flavors
ingredients: 6 oz raw shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/2 cup snap peas, trimmed and halved
instructions: Heat half the sesame oil in a large wok or skillet over high heat. Cook shrimp 2 minutes per side until pink. Remove and set aside.
Add remaining sesame oil, garlic, and ginger. Stir-fry 30 seconds.
Add riced cauliflower and snap peas. Stir-fry for 4-5 minutes until cauliflower is tender but not mushy.
Push vegetables to one side, pour beaten eggs into the empty space, and scramble until set. Mix everything together.
Return shrimp to the wok, add coconut aminos, toss to combine, and garnish with green onions.

lc_lemon_herb_salmon.name: Lemon Herb Baked Salmon
lc_lemon_herb_salmon.description: Oven-baked Atlantic salmon fillet with lemon, dill, and capers alongside roasted asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on one side of the baking sheet.
Place salmon on the other side, brush with melted butter and lemon juice, and top with lemon slices, dill, and capers.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until salmon flakes easily and asparagus is tender-crisp.
Serve immediately with any remaining pan juices drizzled on top.

lc_stuffed_bell_pepper.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Turkey
lc_stuffed_bell_pepper.description: Colorful bell peppers stuffed with seasoned ground turkey, diced tomatoes, and melted mozzarella
ingredients: 2 large bell peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Place bell pepper halves cut-side up in a baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook onion and garlic for 2 minutes, then add ground turkey and cook until browned.
Stir in diced tomatoes, cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper. Simmer 5 minutes.
Fill each pepper half with the turkey mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.
Cover with foil and bake 20 minutes. Remove foil and bake 5-8 more minutes until cheese is bubbly and golden.

lc_chicken_broccoli_alfredo.name: Chicken Broccoli Alfredo
lc_chicken_broccoli_alfredo.description: Tender chicken and broccoli florets in a rich Parmesan cream sauce over steamed cauliflower
ingredients: 6 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, cubed
instructions: Season chicken cubes with salt and pepper. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook chicken until golden, about 6 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, saute garlic for 30 seconds. Add broccoli florets and 2 tablespoons water. Cover and steam 4 minutes.
Pour in heavy cream, add Parmesan, and stir over medium heat until sauce thickens, about 3 minutes.
Return chicken to the pan, add nutmeg, and toss to coat everything in sauce.
Serve over steamed riced cauliflower.

lc_thai_basil_beef_lettuce_cups.name: Thai Basil Beef Lettuce Cups
lc_thai_basil_beef_lettuce_cups.description: Fragrant stir-fried ground beef with Thai basil, chili, and lime served in butter lettuce cups
instructions: Heat avocado oil in a wok or skillet over high heat. Add garlic and chili, stir-fry 30 seconds.
Add ground beef, breaking into small pieces, and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add coconut aminos and fish sauce, toss for 1 minute.
Remove from heat, stir in Thai basil until just wilted, and squeeze lime juice over the mixture.
Spoon beef filling into butter lettuce cups and serve immediately.

lc_pork_chop_green_beans.name: Herb-Crusted Pork Chop with Green Beans
lc_pork_chop_green_beans.description: Pan-seared pork chop with a Dijon-herb crust alongside garlic-sauteed green beans and almonds
instructions: Season pork chop with salt and pepper. Spread Dijon mustard on both sides, then press almond flour, rosemary, and thyme onto the surface.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Sear pork chop 5 minutes per side until crust is golden and internal temperature reaches 145F. Rest 5 minutes.
In another skillet, heat remaining olive oil. Saute green beans and garlic for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Toast sliced almonds in the pan for 1 minute, then toss with the green beans.
Plate pork chop alongside the green beans and serve.

lc_shrimp_scampi_zoodles.name: Shrimp Scampi over Zoodles
lc_shrimp_scampi_zoodles.description: Garlicky butter-wine shrimp scampi served over tender zucchini noodles with a splash of lemon
ingredients: 8 oz large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Pat shrimp dry and season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Melt 1 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook shrimp 2 minutes per side until pink. Remove and set aside.
Add remaining butter and garlic to the pan, cook 30 seconds. Deglaze with white wine and lemon juice, let reduce for 1 minute.
Add spiralized zucchini to the pan and toss for 2 minutes until just tender.
Return shrimp to the pan, toss everything together, and garnish with fresh parsley.

lc_turkey_taco_lettuce_wraps.name: Turkey Taco Lettuce Wraps
lc_turkey_taco_lettuce_wraps.description: Seasoned ground turkey with all the taco fixings wrapped in crisp iceberg lettuce leaves
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground turkey and cook until browned, about 6 minutes.
Add taco seasoning and 2 tablespoons water. Stir and simmer for 3 minutes until sauce thickens.
Spoon seasoned turkey into lettuce leaves.
Top with diced tomato, shredded cheese, avocado, sour cream, and salsa. Garnish with cilantro.

lc_mediterranean_chicken_plate.name: Mediterranean Chicken Plate
lc_mediterranean_chicken_plate.description: Grilled chicken thigh with cucumber-tomato salad, olives, feta, and a drizzle of herbed olive oil
instructions: Season chicken thigh with 1 tbsp olive oil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Grill or pan-sear chicken over medium-high heat for 7-8 minutes per side until internal temp reaches 165F. Rest 5 minutes, then slice.
Toss cucumber, tomato, olives, and feta with remaining olive oil and red wine vinegar.
Plate sliced chicken alongside the Mediterranean salad.

lc_egg_salad_lettuce_cups.name: Egg Salad Lettuce Cups
lc_egg_salad_lettuce_cups.description: Classic creamy egg salad with chives and Dijon served in crisp butter lettuce cups with paprika
instructions: Peel hard-boiled eggs and chop into small pieces.
Mix eggs with mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, chives, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Spoon egg salad into butter lettuce cups.
Dust with smoked paprika and serve.

lc_cobb_salad.name: Classic Cobb Salad
lc_cobb_salad.description: Rows of grilled chicken, bacon, hard-boiled egg, avocado, tomato, and blue cheese over mixed greens
instructions: Arrange mixed greens on a large plate or shallow bowl.
Arrange chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, tomatoes, and blue cheese in neat rows over the greens.
Whisk ranch dressing with red wine vinegar for a thinner consistency.
Drizzle dressing over the salad and serve immediately.

lc_buffalo_chicken_bowl.name: Buffalo Chicken Bowl
lc_buffalo_chicken_bowl.description: Shredded buffalo chicken over a bed of crunchy cabbage slaw with blue cheese and celery
instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat and cook chicken 6-7 minutes per side until done. Rest 3 minutes.
Shred chicken with two forks. Toss with melted butter and buffalo hot sauce.
Arrange shredded cabbage in a bowl and top with celery slices.
Pile buffalo chicken on top, sprinkle blue cheese, and drizzle with ranch dressing.

lc_caprese_chicken.name: Caprese Chicken
lc_caprese_chicken.description: Pan-seared chicken breast topped with fresh mozzarella, sliced tomato, and basil with a balsamic reduction
instructions: Pound chicken to even thickness. Season with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken 5 minutes per side until golden.
Top chicken with tomato slices and mozzarella. Place under broiler for 2-3 minutes until cheese melts and bubbles.
Remove from oven, top with fresh basil leaves, and drizzle balsamic vinegar over the top.

lc_spicy_sausage_cabbage_skillet.name: Spicy Sausage & Cabbage Skillet
lc_spicy_sausage_cabbage_skillet.description: Sliced spicy Italian sausage sauteed with shredded cabbage, onions, and a touch of apple cider vinegar
ingredients: 2 spicy Italian sausage links (6 oz total), sliced into rounds
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage rounds and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add onion to the skillet and saute 3 minutes until softened.
Add shredded cabbage and caraway seeds. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes until cabbage is tender and slightly caramelized.
Return sausage to the pan, add apple cider vinegar, and toss to combine. Season with salt and pepper.

lc_blackened_cod_slaw.name: Blackened Cod with Citrus Slaw
lc_blackened_cod_slaw.description: Cajun-spiced blackened cod fillet served over a bright citrus cabbage slaw with cilantro-lime crema
instructions: Pat cod dry and coat both sides with blackening seasoning.
Heat avocado oil in a cast-iron skillet over high heat. Sear cod 3-4 minutes per side until blackened crust forms and fish flakes easily.
Toss Napa cabbage, carrot, and orange segments with half the lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Mix sour cream with remaining lime juice and cilantro for the crema.
Plate slaw, set blackened cod on top, and drizzle with cilantro-lime crema.

lc_steak_chimichurri.name: Grilled Steak with Chimichurri
lc_steak_chimichurri.description: Juicy grilled flank steak sliced thin and drizzled with fresh parsley-garlic chimichurri sauce alongside grilled zucchini
instructions: Make chimichurri: combine parsley, 1 tbsp olive oil, red wine vinegar, garlic, oregano, and red pepper flakes. Set aside.
Season flank steak generously with salt and pepper. Brush zucchini slices with remaining olive oil.
Grill steak over high heat for 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare (135F internal). Grill zucchini alongside for 3 minutes per side.
Rest steak 5 minutes, then slice thin against the grain.
Plate steak and zucchini, spoon chimichurri generously over the top.

lc_chicken_coconut_curry.name: Chicken Coconut Curry
lc_chicken_coconut_curry.description: Tender chicken simmered in a fragrant coconut curry sauce with spinach, bell pepper, and fresh cilantro
ingredients: 6 oz boneless skinless chicken thigh, cubed
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a deep skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken cubes until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove.
Add garlic, ginger, and curry paste to the pan. Stir for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and fish sauce. Bring to a simmer.
Return chicken and add bell pepper. Simmer for 12 minutes until chicken is cooked through and sauce has thickened.
Stir in spinach until wilted, garnish with cilantro, and serve.

lc_blt_turkey_roll_up.name: BLT Turkey Roll-Ups
lc_blt_turkey_roll_up.description: Deli turkey slices rolled around crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayo for a bread-free BLT experience
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 4 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels and break in half.
Lay turkey slices out flat, overlapping slightly if needed to form a wrap base.
Spread a thin layer of mayo on the turkey, then layer lettuce, tomato, and bacon pieces.
Roll up tightly and cut in half on a diagonal. Secure with toothpicks if needed.

lc_asian_chicken_cabbage_salad.name: Asian Chicken Cabbage Salad
lc_asian_chicken_cabbage_salad.description: Shredded chicken with crunchy Napa cabbage, edamame, and toasted sesame in a ginger-soy vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk together sesame oil, rice vinegar, coconut aminos, and grated ginger for the dressing.
Toss shredded cabbage, edamame, and green onions in a large bowl.
Add shredded chicken on top.
Drizzle with dressing and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds. Toss gently and serve.

lc_broccoli_cheddar_soup.name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
lc_broccoli_cheddar_soup.description: Thick and creamy broccoli cheddar soup made with cauliflower as the base instead of flour for a low-carb version
instructions: Melt butter in a pot over medium heat. Saute onion and garlic for 3 minutes until softened.
Add broccoli, riced cauliflower, and chicken broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Use an immersion blender to partially blend the soup, leaving some chunks for texture.
Stir in heavy cream and cheddar cheese on low heat until cheese is fully melted.
Season with cayenne, salt, and pepper. Serve hot.

lc_cucumber_turkey_bites.name: Cucumber Turkey Bites
lc_cucumber_turkey_bites.description: Thick cucumber rounds topped with cream cheese, deli turkey, and a sprinkle of everything seasoning
ingredients: 1 large English cucumber, sliced into 1/2-inch rounds
instructions: Slice cucumber into thick rounds and pat dry with a paper towel.
Spread about 1 teaspoon of cream cheese on each cucumber round.
Fold or roll a small piece of turkey on top of each.
Sprinkle with everything seasoning and garnish with a tiny dill sprig.

lc_almond_butter_celery.name: Almond Butter Celery Sticks
lc_almond_butter_celery.description: Crisp celery sticks filled with creamy almond butter and topped with a few dark chocolate chips
instructions: Wash celery stalks and cut into 4-inch pieces.
Fill the groove of each celery piece with almond butter.
Sprinkle a few dark chocolate chips and a pinch of flaky sea salt on top.
Serve immediately or refrigerate for a cold snack.

lc_cheese_pepperoni_crisps.name: Cheese & Pepperoni Crisps
lc_cheese_pepperoni_crisps.description: Baked Parmesan and pepperoni crisps for a crunchy, savory, chip-like low-carb snack
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place tablespoon-sized mounds of Parmesan on the baking sheet, spacing them 2 inches apart. Flatten slightly.
Press a pepperoni slice into the center of each cheese mound. Sprinkle with Italian seasoning and garlic powder.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until cheese is golden and crispy. Cool completely on the baking sheet before serving.

lc_guacamole_veggie_dippers.name: Guacamole with Veggie Dippers
lc_guacamole_veggie_dippers.description: Fresh chunky guacamole with lime and cilantro served alongside sliced bell peppers and jicama sticks
instructions: Halve and pit avocado. Scoop flesh into a bowl and mash with a fork to desired chunkiness.
Stir in lime juice, red onion, cilantro, jalapeno, and salt.
Arrange bell pepper strips and jicama sticks on a plate alongside the guacamole.
Serve immediately for best freshness.

lc_string_cheese_almonds.name: String Cheese & Almonds
lc_string_cheese_almonds.description: Simple grab-and-go snack pairing mozzarella string cheese with a small handful of roasted almonds
instructions: Unwrap string cheese sticks.
Portion almonds into a small container or bag.
Enjoy together as a balanced protein-and-fat snack.

lc_deviled_eggs.name: Classic Deviled Eggs
lc_deviled_eggs.description: Creamy deviled eggs with a smooth mustard-mayo filling, topped with smoked paprika and chives
instructions: Place eggs in a pot, cover with cold water, and bring to a boil. Once boiling, cover, remove from heat, and let stand 10 minutes.
Transfer eggs to an ice bath for 5 minutes, then peel.
Halve eggs lengthwise and scoop yolks into a bowl. Mash yolks with mayo, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pipe or spoon filling back into egg white halves. Dust with smoked paprika and garnish with chives.

lc_bacon_wrapped_jalapenos.name: Bacon-Wrapped Jalapeno Poppers
lc_bacon_wrapped_jalapenos.description: Fresh jalapeno halves stuffed with cream cheese, wrapped in bacon, and baked until crispy
ingredients: 4 fresh jalapeno peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Line a baking sheet with foil and set a wire rack on top.
Mix cream cheese, cheddar, garlic powder, and cayenne until combined.
Fill each jalapeno half generously with the cheese mixture.
Wrap a half-slice of bacon around each stuffed jalapeno and place seam-side down on the wire rack.
Bake for 20-22 minutes until bacon is crispy and peppers are tender.

lc_mixed_nuts_dark_chocolate.name: Mixed Nuts & Dark Chocolate Trail Mix
lc_mixed_nuts_dark_chocolate.description: A curated mix of walnuts, pecans, and macadamia nuts with a few squares of 85% dark chocolate
ingredients: 0.5 oz 85% dark chocolate, chopped into small pieces
instructions: Combine walnuts, pecans, and macadamia nuts in a small bowl or container.
Add chopped dark chocolate pieces and toss gently.
Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and serve as a portable snack.

lc_edamame_sea_salt.name: Steamed Edamame with Sea Salt
lc_edamame_sea_salt.description: Warm steamed edamame pods sprinkled with flaky sea salt and a squeeze of lemon
instructions: Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add frozen edamame and cook for 4-5 minutes until tender.
Drain well and transfer to a bowl.
Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and squeeze lemon wedge over the top. Serve warm.

lc_herb_roasted_chicken_thighs.name: Herb Roasted Chicken Thighs
lc_herb_roasted_chicken_thighs.description: Crispy-skinned chicken thighs roasted with rosemary, thyme, and garlic alongside roasted radishes
ingredients: 2 bone-in skin-on chicken thighs (8 oz total)
instructions: Preheat oven to 425F. Pat chicken thighs dry and season generously with salt, pepper, rosemary, and thyme.
Toss halved radishes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and garlic cloves. Spread on a baking sheet.
Heat remaining olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken skin-side down for 4 minutes until golden.
Flip chicken and transfer skillet to the oven alongside the radish pan. Roast 25-30 minutes until chicken reaches 175F internally.
Serve chicken over roasted radishes with pan juices drizzled on top.

lc_salmon_avocado_bowl.name: Salmon Avocado Poke Bowl
lc_salmon_avocado_bowl.description: Cubed fresh salmon with avocado, cucumber, and sesame over riced cauliflower with a soy-ginger sauce
instructions: Microwave or saute riced cauliflower for 2-3 minutes. Season with rice vinegar and let cool slightly.
Toss cubed salmon with coconut aminos, sesame oil, and ginger in a bowl. Let marinate 5 minutes.
Place cauliflower rice in a bowl and arrange salmon, avocado, and cucumber on top.
Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and sliced green onion.

lc_italian_antipasto_plate.name: Italian Antipasto Plate
lc_italian_antipasto_plate.description: A curated plate of salami, fresh mozzarella, marinated artichoke hearts, olives, and roasted red peppers
instructions: Arrange salami and mozzarella slices in overlapping rows on a plate.
Add artichoke hearts, olives, and roasted red pepper strips around the meats and cheese.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with Italian herbs and black pepper.
Serve at room temperature for best flavor.

lc_breakfast_sausage_patties_avo.name: Breakfast Sausage Patties with Avocado
lc_breakfast_sausage_patties_avo.description: Homemade seasoned pork sausage patties served with mashed avocado and a fried egg
instructions: Mix ground pork with sage, fennel, garlic powder, onion powder, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper. Form into 2 patties.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Cook sausage patties 4 minutes per side until browned and cooked through.
In the same skillet, fry the egg to desired doneness.
Plate the sausage patties, top with mashed avocado and fried egg. Season with salt and pepper.

lc_cheesy_broccoli_egg_muffins.name: Cheesy Broccoli Egg Muffins
lc_cheesy_broccoli_egg_muffins.description: Portable egg muffins packed with broccoli and cheddar cheese, perfect for meal prep mornings
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F. Spray a 6-cup muffin tin generously with cooking spray.
Whisk eggs, milk, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Divide broccoli evenly among muffin cups, then pour egg mixture over the top, filling each about 3/4 full.
Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top of each.
Bake for 20-22 minutes until eggs are set and tops are lightly golden. Cool 2 minutes before removing.

lc_prosciutto_melon_skewers.name: Prosciutto & Melon Skewers
lc_prosciutto_melon_skewers.description: Thin prosciutto wrapped around small cantaloupe cubes on skewers with fresh mint
instructions: Wrap a strip of prosciutto around each cantaloupe cube.
Thread onto toothpicks or small skewers, tucking a mint leaf on each.
Arrange on a plate and drizzle lightly with balsamic glaze.
Serve immediately as a refreshing snack or appetizer.

lc_southwest_chicken_stuffed_pepper.name: Southwest Chicken Stuffed Peppers
lc_southwest_chicken_stuffed_pepper.description: Mini sweet peppers stuffed with shredded chicken, black beans, pepper jack cheese, and a touch of cumin
ingredients: 6 mini sweet peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Arrange pepper halves cut-side up on a baking sheet.
Mix shredded chicken with black beans, salsa, cumin, chili powder, and salt.
Fill each pepper half with the chicken mixture and top with pepper jack cheese.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until peppers are tender and cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve.

lc_berry_protein_smoothie.name: Berry Protein Smoothie
lc_berry_protein_smoothie.description: Thick low-carb smoothie with mixed berries, collagen protein, almond milk, and a spoonful of almond butter
instructions: Add almond milk, frozen berries, avocado, and almond butter to a blender.
Add collagen peptides and ice cubes.
Blend on high for 45-60 seconds until smooth and creamy.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

lc_western_scramble.name: Western Scramble
lc_western_scramble.description: Scrambled eggs loaded with diced ham, green bell pepper, onion, and melted cheddar cheese
instructions: Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Saute ham, bell pepper, and onion for 3 minutes until vegetables soften.
Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, pour into the skillet, and gently stir with a spatula.
When eggs are nearly set, sprinkle cheddar on top and fold eggs over.
Cook 30 more seconds until cheese melts, then slide onto a plate.

lc_cream_cheese_pancakes.name: Cream Cheese Pancakes
lc_cream_cheese_pancakes.description: Flourless two-ingredient pancakes made from eggs and cream cheese, served with butter and a few fresh blueberries
instructions: Blend eggs, cream cheese, and cinnamon in a blender until smooth.
Melt butter on a griddle or non-stick pan over medium-low heat.
Pour small rounds of batter (about 3 inches) and cook 2 minutes until bubbles form and edges set.
Flip carefully and cook 1 more minute. These are delicate, so use a thin spatula.
Stack pancakes, top with fresh blueberries and a drizzle of sugar-free syrup if desired.
